name: MultiInputComponent
description:
Input field with multiple selection enabled. Should be used when a user can select between a
limited number of pre-defined options with a filter-enabled context.

Supports Angular Forms.

inputs.name: addOnButtonAriaLabel
inputs.description: Aria-label for the addon button.

inputs.name: addonIconTitle
inputs.description: Title text for the add-on icon button.

inputs.name: allowNewTokens
inputs.description: Whether the multi-input allows the creation of new tokens.

inputs.name: ariaLabel
inputs.description: aria-label attribute binding.

inputs.name: ariaLabelledBy
inputs.description: aria-labelledby attribute binding.

inputs.name: autoComplete
inputs.description: Whether the autocomplete should be enabled; Enabled by default

inputs.name: bodyMaxWidth
inputs.description:
Max width of multi input body.
`none` will not limit width of the dropdown.
`container` will limit width of the dropdown to the width of the multi-input itself.
`number` will limit width of the dropdown by provided number in pixels.

inputs.name: buttonFocusable
inputs.description: Whether AddOn Button should be focusable

inputs.name: byline
inputs.description: Whether list item options should be rendered as byline.

inputs.name: class
inputs.description: user's custom classes

inputs.name: compactCollapse
inputs.description: Whether to use cozy visuals but compact collapsing behavior.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether the input is disabled.

inputs.name: displayAddonButton
inputs.description: Whether to display the addon button.

inputs.name: dropdownValues
inputs.description: Values to be displayed in the unfiltered dropdown.

inputs.name: fillControlMode
inputs.description:
Preset options for the Select body width, whatever is chosen, the body has a 600px limit.
* `at-least` will apply a minimum width to the body equivalent to the width of the control. - Default
* `equal` will apply a width to the body equivalent to the width of the control.
* 'fit-content' will apply width needed to properly display items inside, independent of control.

inputs.name: filterFn
inputs.type: (contentArray: ItemType | _OptionItem<ItemType, ValueType>[], searchTerm: string) => ItemType | _OptionItem<ItemType, ValueType>[]

inputs.name: glyph
inputs.description: Icon of the button on the right of the input field.

inputs.name: glyphFont
inputs.description: Glyph font family

inputs.name: highlight
inputs.description: Whether the search term should be highlighted in results.

inputs.name: includes
inputs.description:
Whether to return results where the input matches the entire string. By default, only results that start
with the input search term will be returned.

inputs.name: inputId
inputs.description: Id attribute for input element inside MultiInput component

inputs.name: itemTemplate
inputs.description:
The template with which to display the individual listed items.
Use it by passing an ng-template with implicit content. See examples for more info.

inputs.name: maxHeight
inputs.description: Max height of the popover. Any overflowing elements will be accessible through scrolling.

inputs.name: mobile
inputs.description: Whether the multi-input should be built on mobile mode

inputs.name: mobileConfig
inputs.description: Multi Input Mobile Configuration, it's applied only, when mobile is enabled

inputs.name: open
inputs.description: Whether multi input popover body should be opened

inputs.name: openDropdownOnAddOnClicked
inputs.description: Whether to open the dropdown when the addon button is clicked.

inputs.name: optionItemIdentifier
inputs.description: Identifier function or path to an identifier property.

inputs.name: placeholder
inputs.description: Placeholder for the input field.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: If it is mandatory field

inputs.name: showAllButton
inputs.description: Whether the multi-input should have show all button.

inputs.name: state
inputs.description:
The state of the form control - applies css classes.
 Can be `success`, `error`, `warning`, `information` or blank for default.

inputs.name: title
inputs.description: The tooltip for the multi-input icon.

outputs.name: addOnButtonClicked
outputs.description: Emits event when the addon button is clicked.

outputs.name: allItemsSelectedChange
outputs.description: Event emitted, when the multi input's all item checked or not

outputs.name: openChange
outputs.description: Event emitted, when the multi input's popover body is opened or closed

outputs.name: searchTermChange
outputs.description: Event emitted when the search term changes. Use *$event* to access the new term.

outputs.name: selectedChange
outputs.description: Event emitted when the selected items change. Use *$event* to access the new selected array.

methods.name: dialogApprove
methods.description: Handle dialog approval, closes popover and propagates data changes.

methods.name: dialogDismiss
methods.description: Handle dialog dismissing, closes popover and sets backup data.

methods.name: selectAllItems
methods.description: Method that selects all possible options.
